items.title: “When Jaco and I first worked together there was nobody I’d rather hang with. There was an appreciation, a joie de vivre, a spontaneity”: How Joni Mitchell combined with Jaco Pastorius to create her sophisticated jazz-infused masterpiece Coyote
items.summary: The song emerged from the hedonism and chaos of Bob Dylan’s Rolling Thunder Revue tour

items.summary: Take our 10-question quiz of this week's hottest music news

items.title: “It's not just about the money – I just wanted my name on there because it was my work and somebody else took the credit”: Rogét Chahayed on signing away his contributions to Kendrick Lamar's To Pimp a Butterfly for "a few thousand bucks"
items.summary: Having worked on Kendrick Lamar's 2015 magnum opus, only to go uncredited, Chahayed reflects on the lessons the experience taught him about the industry

items.title: Lil Baby Drops Pharrell Williams-Produced Single ‘Dead Fresh’
items.summary: The rapper debuted the song last month at the Louis Vuitton’s Menswear Spring-Summer 2027 show in Paris

items.title: Jet2 flight from Glasgow to Lanzarote diverted over 600 miles away amid 'emergency'
items.summary: The Jet2 flight LS167 from Glasgow to Lanzarote was forced to divert to Faro, Portugal, after a passenger required medical attention on board on 16 July, with the flight continuing its journey after the 600-mile detour.

items.title: Applications open for Cost Rental homes in Shankill starting at €1,250 per month
items.summary: Cost Rental guarantees rent prices at least 25% below local market rates and it is aimed at people who have a net household income of €66,000 or below

items.title: Rolling road closures in Dublin city centre this morning - live traffic updates
items.summary: Traffic is busy this morning, as the Friday commute begins with the usual M50 congestion as well as some delays on national roads and in Dublin city

items.title: The Cure’s Robert Smith Blasts FIFA’s World Cup Final Half-Time Show: ‘Please Just F— Off’
items.summary: Madonna, BTS, Shakira and Justin Bieber will appear in Sunday's (July 19) first-ever show, curated by Coldplay's Chris Martin.

items.title: Gracie Abrams Says ‘Daughter From Hell’ Is a ‘Thank-You Note’ To Her Mom
items.summary: The pop artist cracks open “Minibar” on "The Tonight Show" for its debut TV performance.

items.title: Olivia Rodrigo Holds Off Rolling Stones For Australia’s Chart Crown
items.summary: The Rolling Stones drop in at No. 2 on the ARIA Chart with Foreign Tongues, their 25th studio album.

items.title: Leon Bridges announces album ‘Happiness Anytime’ with four new songs: “I want this album to be something that lingers in people’s bones”

items.title: Slipknot “have so much material” and are working on a new album with producer Matt Wallace
items.summary: "We're listening to what I just worked on and I’m just like, ‘Wow, this is wild. This sounds like nothing I’ve ever heard before'," said guitarist Jim Root The post Slipknot “have so much material” and are working on a new album with producer Matt Wallace appeared first on NME.
